title: Unibos | 31-64 Inch Adjustable Lawn Rake For Gardening - For Gardening, Grass, Lawn & Yard Clean Up - Garden Rakes For Leaves, Lawn Leveller, Yard Clean Up Tool
features: ✅𝗘𝗫𝗧𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘 𝗛𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗟𝗘: Telescopic design allows the handle to adjust for user comfort & compact storage, ideal for gardeners of all heights.
✅𝗠𝗨𝗟𝗧𝗜𝗣𝗨𝗥𝗣𝗢𝗦𝗘 𝗙𝗨𝗡𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡: Suitable for clearing leaves, tidying garden debris, levelling soil & maintaining lawns or artificial grass.
✅𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗢𝗡𝗚 & 𝗪𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗥-𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗡𝗧: Features galvanised steel tines & a durable aluminium pole, built to resist rust & harsh outdoor conditions.
✅𝗟𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧𝗪𝗘𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧 & 𝗖𝗢𝗠𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗧𝗔𝗕𝗟𝗘: Ergonomic handle & smooth operation minimise hand strain, perfect for prolonged use in the garden.
✅𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘-𝗦𝗔𝗩𝗜𝗡𝗚 𝗗𝗘𝗦𝗜𝗚𝗡: Compact when closed for easy storage & transport, making it ideal for smaller sheds, garages or garden spaces.
description: Keep your outdoor spaces tidy with the Black Telescopic Garden Leaf Rake. Built for comfort, flexibility & performance, it’s the ideal tool for managing leaves, debris & general garden clean-up with ease.
